Created attachment 247718
Update to 6.3.0

Update to 6.3.0:
- Update License block to reflect all licenses the project consumes
- Switch to PEP517 build
- Depend on Sphinx for building HTML, and the manual page documentation
- Add pytest to ${USES}, and populate ${TEST_DEPENDS}

https://github.com/pyinstaller/pyinstaller/compare/v3.5...v6.3.0
